sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM sys_role_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$

SELECT * FROM sys_role_t WHERE validflag > 0
id!=$id$
ORDER BY id
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role_t (rolename,msgFilter,fieldFilter,eventFilter,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ('$rolename$',$msgFilter$,$fieldFilter$,$eventFilter$,$validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE sys_role_t SET validflag = 0 WHERE id = $id$
